studyName: Columbia-Yale-Bilkent Study: Genetics Study of Essential Tremor

tables.description: This subject phenotype table contains subject ID, age, disease onset age, gender, medications, medical history, baseline measurements including dominant arm, rest tremor (3 variables), sustention tremor (4 variables), kinetic tremor (24 variables), drawing an Archimedes Spiral (6 variables), ET-like head or chin tremor, dystonia, parkinsonian features (5 variables), clinical diagnosis (5 variables), myoclonus, normal, diagnosed as ET (6 variables), psychogenic tremor, not diagnosed with ET, comments (2 variables), finger taps (2 variables), hand movements(2 variables), rapid alternating movements (2 variables), and leg agility (2 variables), and case control status of the subject for Essential Tremor (ET).

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for Essential Tremor (ET)

variables.description: Current age in years

variables.description: Age of disease onset in years
